message:
test(gateway): add delta chain + edge case tests and fix test isolation

checkpoint.test.ts:
- Add test "does not delete delta chain parents needed by remaining checkpoints"
- Verifies pruneCheckpoints() correctly preserves parent checkpoints
  referenced by delta chains, preventing data corruption

checkpoint.ts:
- Fix type annotation: parentId should be `string | null` not just `string`
- Format incrementCounter call for readability

context-health.service.test.ts:
- Add test for zero-token edge case (division by zero guard)
- Verifies reductionPercent is 0 (not NaN) when beforeTokens is 0

setup-readiness-integration.test.ts:
- Add explicit auth context middleware instead of relying on process.env
- Fixes flaky behavior under parallel test execution
- Sets c.set("auth", { isAdmin: true }) for all routes

setup-readiness.test.ts:
- Add beforeEach/afterEach to save/restore ENABLE_SETUP_INSTALL_UNAUTH
- Ensures install endpoint tests don't leak env state

websocket-context.test.tsx:
- Minor formatting (removed trailing line)

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
